case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC VS. YING HOP NG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ( IN LIEU OF TESTINONY) CCP 585 (D); CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, YING HOP $12,949.80 PRINCIPAL, $1,625.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,561.14 INTEREST, $390.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,525.94, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (212)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, YING HOP $32,835.70 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,835.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
